# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Muni Bond Market Eyes Prediction Markets as Risk and Opportunity](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/muni-bond-market-eyes-prediction-markets-as-risk-and-opportunity.html): Municipal bond analysts warn that the rapid growth of prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket introduces both pricing opportunities and liquidity risks for the $4 trillion muni sector, according to Bond Buyer.
- [Kalshi appeals NY court loss blocking sports event-contract state enforcement](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-appeals-ny-court-loss-blocking-sports-event-contract-state-enforcement.html): Kalshi filed a same-day appeal to the Second Circuit on Tuesday, July 8, 2026, after SDNY Judge Analisa Torres denied its bid to stop New York State Gaming Commission officials from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports event contracts.
- [Polymarket Races to Rebuild Trust With US Market Recommitment](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-races-to-rebuild-trust-with-us-market-recommitment.html): Polymarket is mounting a campaign to restore credibility and re-enter the US prediction-market space after a period of regulatory uncertainty and reputational damage, according to reporting by AP News and Yahoo Finance.
- [NY Court Lets Gambling Claims Against Kalshi Sports Contracts Proceed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/ny-court-lets-gambling-claims-against-kalshi-sports-contracts-proceed.html): A New York court declined to dismiss gambling-related claims against Kalshi's sports event contracts, allowing the legal challenge to move forward in what could be a landmark ruling for prediction-market operators.
- [Bloomberg: Prediction Markets Function Effectively Without Real-Money Stakes](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/bloomberg-prediction-markets-function-effectively-without-real-money-stakes.html): A Bloomberg opinion piece argues that prediction markets can generate accurate forecasts even when no actual money is wagered, challenging the assumption that financial incentives are essential to their reliability.
- [Judge Torres Rules Against Kalshi in New York Prediction Markets Case](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/judge-torres-rules-against-kalshi-in-new-york-prediction-markets-case.html): Federal Judge Analisa Torres, known for her Ripple/XRP ruling, dealt Kalshi a significant legal defeat in a New York court case tied to the company's prediction markets operations.
- [Kalshi loses bid to block New York sports-contract gambling enforcement](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-loses-bid-to-block-new-york-sports-contract-gambling-enforcement.html): Judge Analisa Torres on Monday denied Kalshi's emergency motion to prevent New York authorities from enforcing state gambling laws against its sports-event prediction contracts.
- [Kalshi market prices OpenAI government stake at long-shot odds](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-market-prices-openai-government-stake-at-long-shot-odds.html): Traders on Kalshi's prediction market are pricing in slim chances the U.S. government will acquire an equity stake in OpenAI before year-end 2025, according to CNBC.
- [Kalshi traders see Nasdaq-100 above 30,000 by end of 2026](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-traders-see-nasdaq-100-above-30-000-by-end-of-2026.html): Bettors on Kalshi's event-contract markets are pricing in a Nasdaq-100 finish above 30,000 at year-end 2026, implying expectations of a slower second half after recent volatility, according to CNBC.
- [Polymarket World Cup betting volume reaches $3.9B, attracting Trump and Zuckerberg](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-world-cup-betting-volume-reaches-3-9b-attracting-trump-and-zuckerberg.html): Polymarket's prediction-market wagering on the FIFA World Cup surpassed $3.9 billion in volume, drawing interest from Donald Trump and Mark Zuckerberg in the platform's explosive growth.
